changes_detected.detail: New options added: position (String) for specifying where to click, x (Number) and y (Number) for explicit coordinates.

New options added: method (GET or POST), body (optional for POST), headers (for initial request), qs (query parameters), auth (Basic Authorization), failOnStatusCode (default true), retryOnStatusCodeFailure (default false), retryOnNetworkFailure (default true).
New options added: includeShadowDom (to include elements within shadow DOM).
Best practice recommends setting a baseUrl when using cy.visit().
